description: A designed Tren de Aragua 'arrest card' in ICE's recurring template (square). A blue header bar reads 'TdA ARREST' in large gold serif caps. The background is a close-up candid/in-custody photo of a middle-aged man with heavy eyebrows, facial tattoos near his left eye, and a gray hooded jacket, looking sternly at the camera. Overlaid at left in bold white sans-serif is the name 'Pedro Colmenares-Gonzalez.' A red banner across the lower-center carries the charges in white caps: 'HOMICIDE & SEXUAL ASSAULT WITH A FIREARM.' A bottom blue footer bar shows the circular DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' (white) at left, with 'Tren de Aragua' in gold serif at right. The most-wanted-style card uses the subject's facial tattoos and violent charges to dramatize the gang threat for a general public audience and bolster support for ICE enforcement.
notable_text: TdA ARREST; Pedro Colmenares-Gonzalez; HOMICIDE & SEXUAL ASSAULT WITH A FIREARM; Tren de Aragua
